title: Initial VRC Evaluation Prep Checklist
body:
INITIAL EVALUATION PREPARATION CHECKLIST & STRATEGY BRIEF

Veteran: [Your Name]
Date: {{date}}
Assigned Case Stage: {{stage}}

============================================================
1. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS TO BRING
============================================================
[ ] VA Disability Rating Decision (full letter detailing all service-connected conditions and percentages)
[ ] DD Form 214 (Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty)
[ ] Detailed Resume or Work History log (detailing job titles, duties, and physical requirements)
[ ] Transcripts from high school and any universities/training institutions attended
[ ] Copy of active medical restrictions or letters from treating doctors
[ ] Course outline/syllabus for your proposed training program (if selected)

============================================================
2. INTERVIEW PREPARATION STRATEGY
============================================================
- KEY RULE: Do not say 'I have no problems' or 'My disability doesn't affect me.' The counselor's role is to identify your employment handicap. If you claim to have no barriers, they are required by 38 C.F.R. § 21.51 to deny entitlement.
- FOCUS: Explain exactly how your physical or cognitive limitations prevent you from succeeding in your prior jobs or in standard work environments.
- SUITABILITY: Ensure your proposed goal does NOT aggravate your disabilities (e.g. do not request law enforcement if you have severe orthopedic limitations, or desk jobs if you have severe sitting limits).

============================================================
3. EMPLOYMENT IMPAIRMENTS LOGGED
============================================================
Disability rating: {{rating}}%
Employment barriers identified:
{{employmentBarriers}}

Serious Employment Handicap (SEH) indicators:
{{sehJustification}}

Proposed Goal: {{proposedGoal}}

============================================================
4. CONTROLLING LEGAL REFERENCE TO CITE
============================================================
* 38 C.F.R. § 21.50 - Initial Evaluation mandates a thorough, individualized assessment.
* 38 C.F.R. § 21.51 - Establishing an Employment Handicap based on vocational impairment.
* 38 C.F.R. § 21.52 - Establishing a Serious Employment Handicap (critical for 10% ratings or basic period extensions).
* 38 C.F.R. § 21.57 - Resolve all reasonable doubts in favor of the veteran.

Keep this checklist in your records and reference it during your appointment.
